name: voxel-warlock-brawl-arena
description: A 3D low-poly voxel Warlock Brawl clone (Three.js + WebGL) with P2P multiplayer (invite link, room code, QR code).

scripts.test: node test/sim.test.mjs && node test/spells.test.mjs && node test/source.test.mjs && node test/animations.test.mjs && node test/mapgen.test.mjs && node test/collision.test.mjs && node test/physics.test.mjs && node src/stats.test.mjs
